report_types.purpose: Show the known product/lane context, missing fields, official source routes, and next safe move.
report_types.title: Starter Trade Readiness Packet

report_types.purpose: Summarize source-routed market signals without demand, profitability, or buyer-validation claims.
report_types.title: Market Opportunity Brief

report_types.audience: possible buyer, importer, or sales reviewer
report_types.purpose: Prepare buyer-facing context, questions, evidence level, and blocked buyer-validation language.
report_types.title: Buyer-Ready Packet

report_types.audience: supplier, sourcing operator, or supplier reviewer
report_types.purpose: List supplier evidence requested and separate collected evidence from supplier verification.
report_types.title: Supplier Document Request

report_types.audience: customs broker, trade reviewer, or freight reviewer
report_types.purpose: Package customs, tariff, CFIA, responsibility, and unresolved review questions for scoped human review.
report_types.title: Broker Review Packet

report_types.purpose: Show missing documents, missing confirmations, stale source evidence, and next collection steps.
report_types.title: Missing Evidence Report

report_types.audience: compliance reviewer, operator, or launch owner
report_types.purpose: List each blocked claim, why it is blocked, and what evidence or review is required.
report_types.title: Blocked Claims Report

report_types.purpose: Show country-pack coverage, source routes, refresh state, and claim boundaries.
report_types.title: Country Source Map

report_types.audience: operator, source reviewer, or expert reviewer
report_types.purpose: Show source snapshot freshness, source lifecycle state, and packet stale-review needs.
report_types.title: Source Freshness Report

report_types.purpose: Summarize scoped reviewer lanes, pending findings, credential needs, and review gate impacts.
report_types.title: Expert Review Summary

report_types.audience: founder, manager, advisor, or launch owner
report_types.purpose: Summarize scores, blockers, source/evidence state, external gates, and the next safe decision.
report_types.title: Executive Decision Report

report_types.audience: operator, compliance reviewer, or enterprise admin
report_types.purpose: Export report generation inputs, evidence citations, source citations, review status, and audit rows.
report_types.title: Audit Export
